label: 网格细分
description: 在区域外接矩形内做规则网格细分：行、列两个方向同时按 cellHeight×cellWidth 切块，块之间留 gapWidth 间隙（同时充当横向与纵向小径）。每个网格单元输出一张独立 0/1 网格（行优先顺序：先上后下、先左后右），所有间隙合并成一张 gap 网格。行、列各自不能整除的余量整体并入随机一个 band。
description-en: Regular grid subdivision inside a region's bounding box: split along both rows and columns at cellHeight×cellWidth, leaving a gapWidth separator between cells that serves as both horizontal and vertical paths. Each grid cell is emitted as its own 0/1 grid (row-major order), and all gaps are merged into one gap grid. Any non-divisible remainder along each axis is folded into one random band.
icon: 深色背景上一个矩形被横竖等距的细缝切成整齐排列的小方格，像规则田字格，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 0/1（或多值）约束区网格；单元只落在非零有效格内。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) constraint region grid; cells fall only on non-zero valid cells.

inputs.name: cellWidth
inputs.label: 单元列宽
inputs.description: 单个网格单元的列宽（格），最小 1。
inputs.description-en: Column width of each grid cell (in cells), minimum 1.

inputs.name: cellHeight
inputs.label: 单元行高
inputs.description: 单个网格单元的行高（格），最小 1。
inputs.description-en: Row height of each grid cell (in cells), minimum 1.

inputs.name: gapWidth
inputs.label: 间隙宽度
inputs.description: 单元之间的间隙宽度（行列通用），最小 0。间隙格归入 gap 输出。
inputs.description-en: Gap width between cells (shared by rows and columns), minimum 0. Gap cells go to the gap output.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子（用于把行/列余量分配给随机一个 band），0 使用当前时间。
inputs.description-en: Random seed (used to assign row/column remainder to a random band); 0 uses current timestamp.

outputs.name: partition
outputs.label: 单元列表
outputs.description: 每个网格单元一张 0/1 网格，行优先顺序；被掩码截没的空单元自动剔除。
outputs.description-en: One 0/1 grid per grid cell, row-major order; empty cells clipped away by the mask are dropped.

outputs.name: gap
outputs.label: 间隙网格
outputs.description: 所有横/纵间隙合并成的一张 0/1 网格，与输入同形状。
outputs.description-en: A single 0/1 grid merging all horizontal and vertical gaps; same shape as the input.

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: 单元数
outputs.description: 实际切出的非空单元数量。
outputs.description-en: Number of non-empty grid cells produced.
